title: Fix onTick crash, speed, mobs, doors

log.context: Fix onTick crash, speed, mobs, doors

All four fixes applied, client rebuilt, server restarted. Here's a summary:

**Fix 1: `cp is not defined` crash (critical)**
- `/mnt/data/clungiverse-client/src/network/dungeon-network.ts` line 317
- `cp` was a `ClientPlayer` variable defined inside an `else` block (for remote players), but referenced outside that block in the `if (isLocal)` section. After minification, this became the `cp is not defined` ReferenceError. Fixed by looking up the player from `s.players.get(sp.id)` instead.
